message:
fix(deps): pin frankensqlite to a known-good git revision

Tracking `branch = "main"` made builds nondeterministic and recently
pulled a broken upstream revision.  Pinning to rev bc9bdff ensures
reproducible builds while still including the pure-Rust UnixVfs work
that eliminated the glibc 2.39 requirement.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:

 version = "0.1.1"
